original_prompt: 帮我给这个些透明的白色手串添加一个合适的背景，无文案
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
- Subject Lock: A wide, multi-strand cuff bracelet on a model's wrist, composed of stacked rows of transparent, amber-tinted spherical beads with high-gloss refraction. The beads act as lenses, distorting the skin tone beneath.
- Environment: A soft, ethereal aesthetic setting. Light, billowing beige or cream silk fabric acting as a base, with soft natural sunlight filtering through, creating caustic light patterns (water-like reflections) on the surface.
- Lighting: Warm, golden-hour rim lighting highlighting the translucency of the beads. Soft shadows.
- Color Palette: Champagne gold, soft beige, warm amber, and clean white.

[Text & UI Layout]
- Layout Style: Minimalist fashion editorial style. The arm enters diagonally from the bottom left or right.
- Main Title: "Crystal Clear" (Sans-serif, elegant, thin weight, centered or top right)
- Sub Title: "Summer Essence Collection" (Smaller font, spaced out below title)
- Slogan: "Reflect Your Inner Light" (Italic, bottom right corner)
layout_logic: Since the product is a bracelet on a wrist (diagonal composition usually), place the text in the opposite corner to balance the visual weight. Use a clean, airy font to match the transparency of the beads.
